name: Body Weight Scale
necessity: Daily weight tracking is the most basic and important metric for knowing if you are gaining, losing, or maintaining.
advice: Any basic digital scale works. Weigh at the same time daily (morning, after bathroom, before eating).
purchaseReason: Necessity — basic requirement for tracking progress.

name: Body Fat Calipers
necessity: Useful for composition changes, but weight plus photos can be enough.
advice: Affordable for home use; practice consistency. DEXA is more accurate but not required.

name: Measuring Tape
tracks: Body measurements (chest, arms, waist, thighs, etc.)
necessity: Shows muscle growth or fat loss that the scale alone cannot.
advice: Use a simple fabric tape on the same spots weekly or bi-weekly.
purchaseReason: Necessity — essential for tracking muscle growth.

name: Progress Photos
necessity: Photos capture progress numbers miss. Free and highly valuable.
advice: Same lighting, poses, and time of day. Front, side, and back views.
purchaseReason: Necessity — free visual tracking with your phone.

name: Smart Scale (Body Composition)
tracks: Weight plus estimated body fat and muscle mass
necessity: Composition estimates are often inaccurate; the weight reading matters most.
advice: Convenient if you want app sync, but a basic scale + tape + photos is better value.
purchaseReason: Want — convenience and curiosity; accuracy is questionable.

name: Food Scale (Digital)
tracks: Accurate food weights for calorie and macro tracking
necessity: Eyeballing portions leads to inaccurate tracking, especially when cutting.
advice: Any digital kitchen scale in grams works.
purchaseReason: Necessity — essential for accurate nutrition tracking.

name: Nutrition Tracking App
necessity: Apps make accurate logging far easier than paper; free versions are usually enough.
advice: MyFitnessPal, Cronometer, or similar free apps work well.

name: Meal Prep Containers
advice: Any food storage containers work; compartments are nice, not required.

name: Training Log App (Hevy, Strong, etc.)
tracks: Exercises, sets, reps, weight, rest, progression
necessity: You need last session's numbers to progressive overload.
advice: Hevy or Strong are excellent; a notebook also works if used consistently.

name: Notebook / Journal
necessity: Essential if you are not using an app.
purchaseReason: Personal preference for pen and paper.

name: Timer / Stopwatch
necessity: Helpful for timed rest techniques; phone timer is enough.
purchaseReason: Not needed — phone timer is sufficient.

name: Sleep Tracker (App or Wearable)
necessity: Sleep drives recovery; detailed trackers are optional.
advice: Free apps work; focus on consistently getting 7–9 hours.

name: Heart Rate Monitor
necessity: Interesting but not necessary for bodybuilding progress.
advice: Prioritize progressive overload over heart-rate zones for hypertrophy.
purchaseReason: Want — curiosity about training heart rate.
